title: Principal Frontend Developer at Adobe India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Adobe India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Adobe India Holdings Services in Kochi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Adobe India Holdings Services:
Adobe India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adobe India Holdings Services!
